# Bug: Audible clicks every ~100ms during playback — brown noise re-seeded per callback chunk

> Bug ID: SPECTRAL-BUG-001
> Severity: major
> Status: 🔴 reported
> Reported: 2026-06-06

## Description

engine.py callback calls _brown_noise(frames) fresh on every ~100ms chunk: new random walk, normalised per chunk — amplitude jumps at every boundary produce rhythmic clicking. The noise state must persist across callbacks (precompute or carry the walk + running normalisation). See BUG_REPORT.md.
